global_screening_notes: Only ingest self-owned, licensed, public-domain, CC0, CC BY, or CC BY-SA imagery that is clearly reusable for training.
Do not ingest runway photographs, magazine scans, celebrity/editorial images, screenshots, or third-party brand boards without explicit rights.
For Smithsonian, keep CC0 only; for Europeana, skip In Copyright and No Copyright-Non Commercial statements; for NYPL, keep public-domain items only.
If a collection description warns that images may be straight copies of named couture designers, treat it as high-risk and keep it out of the auto-training set.
Prefer full-page hand-drawn studies on paper with visible line, wash, marker, or construction notation.

met_open_access.name: The Met Open Access
met_open_access.rights_gate: Only keep records with isPublicDomain=true and a downloadable primaryImage.
preferred_filters: objectName in [Drawing, Print, Costume design, Design] when available

smithsonian_open_access.name: Smithsonian Open Access
smithsonian_open_access.rights_gate: Only keep items explicitly marked CC0. Skip 'usage conditions apply' and skip non-CC0 media.
preferred_filters: Collections Search Center for advanced filtering

nypl_public_domain.name: NYPL Public Domain Collections
nypl_public_domain.rights_gate: Only keep items surfaced through NYPL public-domain search or item pages that state no restrictions on use.
preferred_filters: Drawings / Costume Design Drawings / Fashion plates

cooper_hewitt_open_source.name: Cooper Hewitt Open Source
cooper_hewitt_open_source.rights_gate: Verify item-level media rights before download; keep only openly reusable records/media.
preferred_filters: Collection API or Explore the Collection search

europeana.name: Europeana
europeana.rights_gate: Keep CC0, Public Domain Mark, CC BY, or CC BY-SA only. Skip InC, InC-EDU, NoC-NC, CNE, and other restricted statements.
preferred_filters: Rights in [CC0, PDM, CC BY, CC BY-SA]
Provider metadata with traceable source institution

loc.name: Library of Congress
loc.rights_gate: Keep only items whose record says 'Rights Advisory: No known restrictions on publication' or an equivalent unrestricted rights statement.
preferred_filters: Prints and Photographs / Fashion plate / Costume

style_packs.search_focus: Poised tailored silhouettes, waisted couture balance, watercolor-soft fashion studies.
query_terms: fashion plate tailored suit watercolor illustration
couture dress design graphite watercolor drawing
hourglass silhouette fashion illustration outerwear sketch
screening_notes: Prefer waist emphasis, soft watercolor, polished presentation pages.
Do not ingest direct designer-name copies or house-labelled archival reproductions.

style_packs.search_focus: Architectural contour, cocoon volume, restrained atelier draftsmanship.
query_terms: costume design drawing sculptural volume
architectural silhouette fashion illustration gouache
structured coat dress design sketch graphite
screening_notes: Favor clean negative space and sculpted mass over decorative surface print.

style_packs.search_focus: Surreal couture ornament, sharp ink, metallic or luminous accent cues.
query_terms: surreal costume design drawing metallic ornament
fantasy fashion illustration ink gold accent
avant garde costume sketch surreal drawing
screening_notes: Use only hand-drawn pages with surreal object logic or symbolic ornament; skip straight photographic documentation.

style_packs.search_focus: Fast editorial croquis, black marker energy, unfinished fitting-room confidence.
query_terms: quick fashion sketch marker croquis
gestural fashion illustration black marker white highlight
rapid backstage croquis editorial drawing
screening_notes: Keep only visibly hand-drawn sketches with rapid gesture lines; skip polished lithographic plates.

style_packs.search_focus: Engineered glamour, sharp shoulders, armored or insect-like couture drama.
query_terms: futurist costume design body armor sketch
science fiction fashion illustration insect wing silhouette
power shoulder costume design sharp contour
screening_notes: Prefer angular body architecture and high-contrast linework.

style_packs.search_focus: Lavish storytelling, romantic movement, ornamented theatrical costume pages.
query_terms: baroque costume design watercolor ornate sketch
romantic theatrical costume drawing embellished gown
historical fantasy costume design illustration
screening_notes: Favor pages with visible embellishment notes, layered washes, and narrative costume styling.

style_packs.search_focus: Body-conscious line, corsetry notation, decadent stagewear and cabaret structure.
query_terms: corset costume design drawing cabaret stage
structured bodice performance costume sketch
lingerie inspired costume contour drawing
screening_notes: Prefer seam and boning readability; avoid pin-up photography masquerading as sketches.

style_packs.search_focus: Historic costume disruption, anarchic linework, rococo volume cut with rebellious attitude.
query_terms: punk costume design collage sketch historical dress
rococo costume drawing rebellious styling
deconstructed historical fashion illustration ink
screening_notes: Keep asymmetry, tartan-like blocking, and disruptive drape cues where legally reusable.

style_packs.search_focus: Faint graphite residue, construction marks, pattern-study minimalism, erased edges.
query_terms: pattern study fashion sketch unfinished graphite
garment construction drawing deconstructed tailoring
minimal fashion study erased graphite seams
screening_notes: Prefer process pages, seam studies, and pattern annotations over finished glamorous illustrations.

style_packs.search_focus: Biomechanical geometry, wireframe line, technical pen precision, kinetic structure.
query_terms: biomorphic costume design wireframe drawing
geometric fashion illustration technical pen
futuristic dress design lattice sketch
screening_notes: Look for lattice, biomorphic shell, and technical-grid qualities.

style_packs.search_focus: Pleat logic, fold studies, origami motion, airy sculptural movement.
query_terms: pleated garment design study origami sketch
fold study fashion drawing movement
pleat structure costume design illustration
screening_notes: Prefer visible fold systems and motion marks; skip flat catalog renderings.

style_packs.search_focus: Clean mod geometry, optical white space, crisp futuristic 1960s drafting.
query_terms: mod fashion drawing geometric dress sketch
space age costume design clean line
1960s futuristic fashion plate geometric silhouette
screening_notes: Keep hard-edged geometry and white-ground clarity; avoid noisy painterly treatments.

style_packs.search_focus: Modular panel logic, metallic reflection cues, industrial couture assembly.
query_terms: metallic costume design modular dress sketch
disc dress chainmail fashion illustration
industrial couture drawing reflective panels
screening_notes: Favor repeated units, disc or panel construction, and reflective media notes.

style_packs.search_focus: Layered color, eccentric ornament, retro romantic abundance, expressive page fullness.
query_terms: ornamental fashion illustration layered color sketch
eclectic costume design floral pattern drawing
maximalist dress sketch saturated watercolor
screening_notes: Prefer rich palette, decorative print notation, and whimsical accessory rhythms drawn on paper.

style_packs.search_focus: Smudged charcoal drama, razor contour, gothic elegance and theatrical tension.
query_terms: gothic costume design charcoal fashion sketch
dramatic black fashion illustration sharp silhouette
dark romantic costume drawing smudged charcoal
screening_notes: Use only hand-drawn dark studies; skip photographed garments on mannequins.

style_packs.search_focus: Sparse black ink, sleek tailoring, elegant negative space, tuxedo-like line economy.
query_terms: minimal fashion sketch tuxedo tailoring
sleek tailoring illustration black ink negative space
precise fashion drawing suit silhouette
screening_notes: Keep crisp line economy and formal tailoring clarity; avoid decorative overload.
